title: Palm Tree Conservation & Environmental Sustainability
summary: Reshma Foundation promotes environmental sustainability through large-scale palm tree plantation initiatives across Tamil Nadu, contributing to ecological restoration, biodiversity preservation, and long-term environmental protection.
description: Reshma Foundation, together with Lions Club and environmental partners, has undertaken large-scale ecological initiatives aimed at restoring and protecting Tamil Nadu’s natural environment through palm tree conservation. Massive palm seed plantation drives were carried out across coastal regions including Panaiyur, Marakanam, Thiruvenkaranai, Trichy, Virudhunagar, Kalpakkam, and Rameswaram. Thousands of palm seeds and saplings were planted with the participation of volunteers, social organizations, and community groups as part of a broader environmental vision to restore traditional ecosystems and strengthen climate resilience. With plantation efforts reaching nearly five lakh palm seeds, the initiative reflects Reshma Foundation’s long-term commitment to environmental sustainability, biodiversity preservation, and community-driven ecological restoration.
